name: Broiled Cod with Puffy Cheese Sauce
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup white medium sharp grated Cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
Allow cod to stand at room temperature for 30 minutes. Cut semi-defrosted fillets into 8 portions of 6 to 7 ounces each. Place on a greased baking sheet or pan. Sprinkle with salt and pepper, then broil for 8 to 10 minutes per half-inch thickness. Do not turn the fish.
While the fish is broiling, mix mayonnaise, cheese, sweet pickle, parsley, thyme, and cayenne pepper in a bowl. Beat egg whites until stiff and fold into the mayonnaise-cheese mixture. Spread the sauce evenly on each cooked fish portion on an oven-safe serving dish or platter. Place under the broiler for 1 to 2 minutes until the sauce is puffed and lightly browned.
Serves 8.
